tweets.text: Not sure if refinancing is worth it? Run the numbers in seconds with our free calculator.
How much home can you really afford? Our mortgage calculator factors in taxes, insurance, and PMI.
Your monthly loan payment isn't just principal — interest adds up fast. See the full picture with our loan calculator.
Buying a car? Compare loan terms and total interest before you sign.
What if you invested $500 a month for 30 years? Our investment calculator shows the growth with compounding.
One extra payment a year on your mortgage can save you thousands in interest. Try our amortization calculator.
Will your savings last through retirement? Our retirement calculator helps you plan withdrawals and growth.
Tax refund or tax bill? Estimate your federal taxes in minutes with our free tax calculator.
Americans carry an average of $6,500 in credit card debt. Our debt payoff calculator shows the fastest way out.
Paying off debt vs. investing — which should you prioritize? Use our debt avalanche vs. snowball calculator to decide.
Saving for a down payment? See how long it will take with our savings goal calculator.
The Rule of 72: divide 72 by your annual return to see how fast your money doubles. Use our compound interest calculator.
Renting vs. buying — which makes more sense in your city? Our rent vs. buy calculator breaks it down by year.
Over 124 free calculators on QFINHUB — mortgages, loans, investing, taxes, and more. No sign-up needed.
